summary: Cross-manuscript continuity verification complete for all 22 chapters. Timeline now complete with entries for every chapter (8 gaps filled: ch 5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 21). POV alternation verified: Kaelith (odd chapters) / Lirien (even chapters) consistent throughout. Character positions verified: no impossible transitions or teleportation. Magic system compliance verified: all usage consistent with MAG-001 through MAG-010 and FU-001. Bond mechanics verified: transmits emotion only, cannot fabricate, can be walled but not severed (MAG-007). Contract loophole execution (ch20) verified against MAG-005 (binding language) and FU-001 (no resurrection). Knowledge states rebuilt with progressive chapter-by-chapter tracking for both leads. Information asymmetry map corrected: 9 fixes including character ID mapping error (CHAR-014/CHAR-003) and stale unknownBy lists. All foreshadowing plants have payoffs. All 15 mystery boxes closed. 8 discrepancies catalogued (0 critical, 2 major, 1 moderate, 5 minor).

major.description: Thalen Reyvas seat number: politics.json says Sixth Seat, all chapters say Seventh Seat
major.recommendation: Update politics.json to swap Sixth/Seventh Seat assignments (chapters are internally consistent)

major.description: Character ID mapping: info-asymmetry-map used CHAR-014 for Thalen Reyvas, should be CHAR-003
major.recommendation: FIXED in this pass. All CHAR-014 references to Thalen corrected to CHAR-003.

moderate.recommendation: FIXED in this pass. All lists updated to reflect ch19-22 knowledge transfers.

Foreshadowing ledger duplicate IDs (FS-017 through FS-020)

unresolvedRequiringAction.action: Decide canonical seat number for Thalen Reyvas and update either politics.json or all chapter drafts. Recommend updating politics.json since all chapters are internally consistent.
